notes: GoldSrc/HLDS. rcon rides UDP on the game port. maps are queried live from the running server.

commands.name: change_map
commands.description: Switch to a different map immediately.

commands.name: restart_round
commands.description: Restart the current round after a delay in seconds.

commands.name: kick_player
commands.description: Kick a player by name or userid (see server_status for ids).

commands.name: ban_player
commands.description: Ban a player by userid for N minutes (0 = permanent).

minutes.description: Ban length in minutes; 0 is permanent

userid.description: Numeric userid from the players query

commands.name: say
commands.description: Broadcast a message to everyone on the server.

commands.name: set_join_password
commands.description: Set or clear the password players need to join (empty clears it). Distinct from the rcon admin password.

password.description: Join password; empty string removes it

queries.name: players
queries.description: Who is connected: userid, name and steamid for each player, plus the current map. Use the userid with kick_player / ban_player.

cvars.name: mp_timelimit
cvars.description: Minutes per map before it changes.

cvars.name: mp_startmoney
cvars.description: Money each player starts a match with.

cvars.name: sv_gravity
cvars.description: World gravity; 800 is default, lower is floatier.
